title: DonutRTP
description: DonutRTP is a lightweight random-teleport plugin that safely sends players to valid locations with configurable distance, cooldown, economy cost, and multi-world support. It’s optimized for SMP servers and prevents unsafe teleports.
body:
📦 DonutRTP — Random Teleport System

DonutRTP is a lightweight and flexible RTP (Random Teleport) plugin designed to provide safe, fair, and customizable teleportation for survival-based servers. Inspired by popular networks like DonutSMP, this plugin helps players quickly jump into the wilderness while minimizing danger and performance cost.

🔑 Key Features:

🔀 Smart Random Teleporting:
Teleports players to safe, valid locations while avoiding oceans, lava, caves, and void areas.

🗺 Multi-world Support
Configure RTP settings independently for each world (Overworld, Nether, End, custom worlds).

⚙️ Fully Configurable
Adjust min/max radius, cooldowns, costs, messages, and safety rules directly from config.

🔄 Cooldown System
Prevents abuse. Adjustable per-world cooldowns.

📃 Custom Messages
Modify prefix and success/fail messages.

🚀 Optimized Performance
Fast location scanning with minimal TPS impact.

🧠 Intelligent Nether Logic
Prevents players from teleporting on top of the Nether bedrock roof, instead finding a safe location within the main caverns.

📁 Main Command:

/rtp
• Teleports the player to a random location

/rtp reload
• Reloads the configuration file

🔑 Permissions

donut.rtp.use
- Allows players to use the /rtp command. (Default: true)

donut.rtp.admin
- Allows usage of the /rtp reload command. (Default: op)

donut.rtp.bypass.cooldown
- Allows players to bypass the teleport cooldown. (Default: op)

donut.rtp.bypass.move
- Allows players to move during the countdown without cancelling. (Default: op)

📄 Configuration

Adjustable distances

Delay before teleport

Cooldowns

Blacklisted worlds

Safe location scanning

📂 Requirements

Minecraft Server: Paper / Purpur recommended but any Fork works.

🏆 Why DonutRTP?

DonutRTP provides the perfect balance of simplicity + control, making it ideal for:

• SMP servers
• Economy servers

Players can explore freely and safely, without worrying about landing in deadly terrain.
